title: hydrocotyle verticillata var. bonariensis
intro: Hydrocotyle verticillata var. bonariensis, also known as pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of pennywort include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting liver and kidney health. Pennywort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in salads and as a garnish, making it a versatile and nutritious addition to various herbal preparations.
